scripts.up: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run migrate && bun run seed && docker compose up -d --wait api web
scripts.migrate: docker compose up -d --wait postgres && bun --filter @care-desk/api db:migrate:deploy && bun --filter @care-desk/api db:generate
scripts.seed: docker compose up -d --wait postgres && bun --filter @care-desk/api db:seed
scripts.dev: bun run up && docker compose logs -f api web
scripts.build: bun --filter @care-desk/shared build && bun --filter @care-desk/api build && bun --filter @care-desk/web build
scripts.test: bun --filter @care-desk/shared test && bun --filter @care-desk/api test && bun --filter @care-desk/web test
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter @care-desk/api db:generate && bun --filter @care-desk/shared typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/api typecheck && bun --filter @care-desk/web typecheck
